product: Vector Search storage-optimized endpoints are GA
tagline: Vector Search storage optimized endpoints are now generally available.
what_it_does: Vector Search storage optimized endpoints are now generally available. Storage optimized endpoints have a larger capacity (over one billion vectors at dimension 768) and provide 10 20x faster indexing than standard endpoints. Pricing is optimized for the larger number of vectors.
why_it_matters: Storage optimized endpoints have a larger capacity (over one billion vectors at dimension 768) and provide 10 20x faster indexing than standard endpoints.

key_takeaway: Vector Search storage optimized endpoints are now generally available.
